name: documents
notes: INSERT fires on every upload; fields name and file_type come from the uploaded file, file_path is /uploads/{uuid}{ext}, tags is NULL (the upload area does not send tags), uploaded_by is req.user.email when a JWT is present.
SELECT fires via GET /api/documents immediately after a successful upload to refresh the document grid.

name: documents_v2
notes: Populated indirectly: the AFTER INSERT trigger trg_sync_to_v2 on the documents table copies each new row here, but deliberately omits the tags column — documents_v2 rows will always have NULL tags regardless of what was in documents.
The upload area itself does not query documents_v2 directly; the side-write is a DB-level concern the Angular replacement must be aware of.
